Include hours worked by salaried, hourly, part-time and workers including temporary help services workers under your supervision, even if they were not under your direct employment. Do not include vacation, sick leave, holidays, or any other non-work time, even if employees were paid for it. If your establishment keeps records of only the hours paid or if you have employees who are not paid by the hour, please estimate the hours that the employees actually worked. If this number isn't available, an estimate is still needed.
Please enter the total number of hours worked by all employees during the given year. Please round your answer to the next highest whole number.
Please enter the number of fatalities for the given year.
Please enter the total number of occupational accidents resulting in 4 calendar days or more of absence from work for the given year.
Please enter the number of major injuries, excluding fatalities, that are resulted in three lost working days or less injuries for the given year.

Count each “acidente de trabalho” in which the worker received professional medical care (such as a doctor’s appointment, stitches, X-rays, prescription medication, physiotherapy, or hospital care) following the occurrence, but was able to return to work on the next scheduled working day. Do not count cases treated only with first aid, or any case where the worker was absent for any time beyond the accident day.\n\nLei n.º 98/2009, de 04 de Setembro – Regime de reparação de acidentes de trabalho e doenças profissionais
Please enter the total number of Minor occupational accidents requiring medical treatment beyond first aid, but which did not result in any days of absence from work after the day of the accident.

Report serious near misses (situações de perigo grave e iminente)—events that posed a real risk of serious injury or death under foreseeable conditions, even if no harm occurred.\nThese must be investigated and internally documented in accordance with Lei n.º 102/2009, Article 15(1)(i)\n
Please enter the total number of serious dangerous occurrences (situações de perigo grave e iminente) identified at your workplace during the year.
Avetta Portugal Annual Update

### High Work Hours:

Are your hours and/or employee count entered correctly? The total number of hours reported are considerably *HIGHER* than the average annual hours typically worked by full-time employees.

Please validate that you have entered your correct employee count and/or total hours. If correct, provide a brief explanation for approval (this will be visible to your client connections). Otherwise, please correct your answers.

### Low Work Hours:

Are your hours and/or employee count entered correctly? The total number of hours reported are considerably *LOWER* than the average annual hours typically worked by full-time and part-time employees.

Please validate that you have entered your correct employee count and/or total hours. If correct, provide a brief explanation for approval (this will be visible to your client connections). Otherwise, please correct your answers.

Examples include anthrax, hepatitis, legionellosis or leptospirosis.
